title: Evil's Emojis
description: A plugin i made a while ago, which adds a few emojis.
body:
![plugin logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19f47b70fab2152cbc9c7a98e99182aa977e4e89.png)
This is a plugin i made a while ago for my friend, and i thought why not upload it here too! The plugin adds some new emojis and a config, sadly i'm not going to update this plugin anymore most likely so it'll probably stay as is, it only has a few emojis and they're toggleable, but there's no way to add new emojis sadly. This plugin could be a interesting way to improve your chat expierience even though it has a few emojis! Also i dont remember the timeline of the features i added, so i might be wrong about the section/timeline of the versions i upload.
Fun fact: the logo is icy since i made this plugin around 2024 december/2025 january.

### This project is sadly discontinued indefinitely due to me losing all of the files.
